title: phaenanthoecium koestlinii
intro: Phaenanthoecium koestlinii, also known as Koestlin's feathergrass, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and providing antioxidant effects. Phaenanthoecium koestlinii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
